case_title: WHEELS FINANCIAL GROUP, LLC VS. MATTHEW Z AKULUZE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY WHEELS FINANCIAL GROUP, LLC DBA LOANMART AS TO DEFENDANT AKULUZE, MATTHEW Z ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-15-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WHEELS FINANCIAL GROUP, LLC DBA LOANMART RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AKULUZE, MATTHEW Z $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,500.00, PARTIES STIPULATED TO JUDGMENT AND TO THIS PAYMENT PLAN. PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $50.00 PER MONTH, BEGINNING ON SEP-01-2017 AND ON THE 1ST DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-15-2017 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-15-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-15-2017 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MICHAEL MAU. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY ROBERTO MONTEJANO, CONSUMER LITIGATION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL MAU; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 85.50 SERVED JUL-07-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT AKULUZE, MATTHEW Z
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WHEELS FINANCIAL GROUP, LLC DBA LOANMART
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY WHEELS FINANCIAL GROUP, LLC DBA LOANMART AKULUZE, MATTHEW Z
